[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010000 1
1 00001011 3
2 00110000 2
3 10001011 4
4 11110100 5
5 11000011 4
6 10010110 4
7 00000010 1

01 10 00101001 3
12 21 01001001 3
23 32 10000100 2
34 43 10000000 1

56 65 01010010 3
67 76 00010010 2
70 07 00000010 1 match 7

71 17 00010000 1 match 0
